label: Survey the Briar Edge
objective: Reach the Ember Shrine east of town, then return to town with your report.

label: Burn the First Nest
objective: Defeat two Briar Goblins on the watchpost lanes, then return to town for the debrief.

label: Secure the Shrine Road
objective: Revisit the Ember Shrine, bring down the Sap Wolf stalking the grove, then return to town.
